title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 02 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 02 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 02 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 02/11/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose largely today, breaking through recent highs again. an increase of 1.59% throughout the day. some traders quotation is still stronger; Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high.
